extractions.problem: Predicting and designing effective cell penetrating peptides
extractions.method: SVM-based models using amino acid composition features
extractions.finding: High accuracy prediction of cell penetrating peptides

extractions.problem: Low observation numbers in biomedical research

extractions.finding: Omics-driven mechanistic models of brain metabolism
